label: Bracket 3 (Upgraded)
officialSummary: Decks stronger than modern precons; up to 3 Game Changers; no mass land denial; no intentional early two-card infinite combos; extra turns in low quantity without chaining.

fastMana.summary: Fast mana is allowed in Bracket 3. Bracket 3 does NOT ban Sol Ring, Mana Vault, Ancient Tomb, Mox Opal, or other ramp rocks by default.

solRing.note: Wizards explicitly excluded Sol Ring from the Game Changers list; it does not count toward the 3 GC cap.

countsAsGameChanger.note: Several fast-mana pieces ARE on the official Game Changers list and each consumes one of your three GC slots in Bracket 3.

notOnGameChangersList.note: Strong ramp that is NOT on the Game Changers list is legal without using a GC slot (subject to project banlist).

fastMana.agentGuidance: Never tell users fast mana is banned in Bracket 3. When recommending cuts, cite deck strategy or GC budget — not a nonexistent fast-mana ban.

projectBanlistSeparate.note: Project banlist (e.g. Mana Crypt) is independent of Commander Brackets. A card can be legal in Bracket 3 but banned in this repo.

intentOverChecklist: Bracket labels depend on deck intent and power, not checklist alone. MCP validates enforceable rules; agents should not over-reject legal cards.
